user_query: My company is planning to install solar panels on our office rooftop. Can you provide me with the PV power forecasts for the next week, considering the specific characteristics of our system? I also need the historical weather records for the past month to assess the solar potential of our location.

TaskList.description: Gather historical weather records for the past month to assess solar potential.
Analyze the gathered historical weather data to determine solar potential.
Generate PV power forecasts for the next week based on the system specifications and historical data.
